sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - player and target positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"Player: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Target: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash']}")

# Check adjacency
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
for a, b in adj:
    na = seg['nodes'][a]
    nb = seg['nodes'][b]
    if na['color'] == 'b' or nb['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"Player adjacent to: {nb['color']} (id={b})")
    if na['color'] == 'Y' or nb['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Target adjacent to: {nb['color']} (id={b})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
